entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop being studied for growth and grain yield under stress.

entities.name: ABIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Non-living environmental factors that modify growth and yield processes.

entities.name: BIOTIC STRESSES
entities.description: Living factors, specifically diseases, that affect plant health.

entities.name: GROWTH
entities.description: The physical development and increase in size of the plant.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The total amount of grain produced by the plant.

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: Stress resulting from inadequate or excessive water availability.

entities.name: TEMPERATURE STRESS
entities.description: Stress resulting from extreme heat or cold.

entities.name: NUTRIENT STRESS
entities.description: Stress resulting from the deficiency of essential nutrients.

entities.name: INTERCEPTION OF SOLAR RADIATION
entities.description: The process by which plants capture sunlight for photosynthesis.

entities.name: PRODUCTION OF PHOTOSYNTHATE
entities.description: The synthesis of organic compounds from carbon dioxide and water using light energy.

entities.name: ACTIVE GREEN LEAF AREA
entities.description: The total area of healthy green leaves available for photosynthesis.

entities.name: CARBON AND ENERGY FLOW
entities.description: The movement of carbon and energy through the plant's tissues.

entities.name: PATHOGEN INVASION
entities.description: The process by which a disease-causing organism enters the host plant.

entities.name: DISEASE
entities.description: An abnormal condition that negatively affects the plant's health.

entities.name: CHARCOAL ROT
entities.description: A specific disease associated with stress during grain filling.

entities.name: CARBOHYDRATE MOBILIZATION
entities.description: The movement of stored carbohydrates from roots and stalks to other tissues.

entities.name: HOST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to defend itself against pathogen infection.

entities.name: INFECTION
entities.description: The successful establishment of a pathogen within a host plant.

entities.name: HOST-PATHOGEN MODELS
entities.description: Theoretical frameworks used to explore disease development and resistance.
